description.value:
Wind Walker

Some Hiraishin become so skilled at their bloodline’s power that they soon become like the wind itself, in combat they’re frustratingly difficult to corner or pin down and capturing is truly a difficult task. These Wind Walkers are nothing to be trifled with and are some of the clan’s greatest assassins simply for their ability to get in, strike their target unhindered and then vanish.

Requirements

To qualify to become a wind walker, a character must fulfill all the following criteria.

  • Base Attack Bonus: +3
  • Skills: Taijutsu 6 ranks, Tumble 6 ranks
  • Feats: Advanced Bloodline (Hiraishin), Acrobatic
  • Special: Hiraishin +1

Class Information

The following information pertains to the Wind Walker prestige class.

  • Hit Die: d8
  • Action Points: 6 + ½ character level, rounded down. CLASS SKILLS The Wind Walker's class skills are Balance (Dex), Chakra Control (Wis), Climb (Str), Craft (Int), Hide (Dex), Jump (Str), Move Silently (Dex), Profession (Wis), Sleight of Hand (Dex), Survival (Wis), Taijutsu (Str), and Tumble (Dex)
  • Skill Points: 5 + Int modifier.

Table: The Wind Walker

Level Base Attack Bonus Fort Save Ref Save Will Save Special Defense Bonus Reputation Bonus
1st +1 +0 +2 +0 Combat Flow, Impact +1d8 +1 +0
2nd +2 +0 +3 +0 Evasion X, Flow Counter +2 +0
3rd +3 +1 +3 +1 Moving Target +2 +0

Class Features

The following features pertain to the Wind Walker prestige class.

Combat Flow

Once per round, as an immediate action and at the cost of 4 points of chakra, the Wind Walker can use thisability. When the character is subject to a melee or melee touch attack, he can attempt a Tumble check as a reaction to negate the hit. The hit is negated if your Tumble result is greater than the opponent’s attack roll.

Impact

As a full attack action, the Wind Walker can charge with deadly results. This is treated as a line attack with the user’s base speed as the range, that provokes no Attacks of Opportunity for passing through threatened areas, with the user appearing in an empty square at the end of his range. One attack roll is made against each creature within range and if hit, are dealt additional sonic damage equal to the character’s Impact. This ability is usable once per day for every level the character possesses in the Wind Walker class.

Evasion X

The Wind Walker gains Evasion or Improved Evasion if they already have it. This ability only functions if the Wind Walker is in light or no armor and is unencumbered.

Flow Counter

Whenever the character successfully negates an attack with Combat Flow, he gains a +1 to attack and damage rolls against that opponent for 1 round. In addition, the opponent is treated as flat-footed against this character’s first attack during that round.

Moving Target

As long as the character’s Hiraishin ability is active, they receive their Hiraishin as a dodge bonus (rounded down) to defense versus ranged attacks. Also, whenever the character makes a successful reflex save versus an effect that targets him specifically, he can choose to move up to 10 feet in any direction. This ability ceases to function whenever the character is flat-footed or otherwise immobile.
